source.title: 618 2025 百亿补贴 comparison: JD vs Taobao vs PDD (Zhihu analysis)

extractions.claim: Domestic product-level price comparison: PDD generally cheapest on most categories except Apple/3C where JD is competitive
extractions.evidence:
618 2025 百亿补贴 pricing across platforms:

| Product | Pinduoduo 百亿补贴 | Taobao 百亿补贴 | JD.com 百亿补贴 | Official Price |
|---------|-------------------|-----------------|----------------|----------------|
| iPhone 16 Pro 128GB (w/ 国补) | ¥5,398 | ~¥5,400-5,500 | Higher | ¥7,999 |
| iPhone 16 Pro Max 256GB | ~¥7,558 | ¥7,558 | 'Conservative' | ¥9,999 |
| iPhone 16 Pro Max 512GB | ~¥9,548 | ¥9,548 | Higher | ¥11,999 |
| iPhone 14 128GB (百亿补贴 era) | ¥4,899 | ¥4,899+ | ¥4,899 | ¥5,999 |

Key findings:
- PDD often undercuts JD by as little as ¥1, ¥0.10, or even ¥0.01 on identical products
- For Apple products specifically, JD Apple Zone generally most competitive of three platforms — but gaps often just dozens of yuan
- Outside 3C digital, JD 百亿补贴 prices mostly not as competitive as Taobao and PDD
- PDD 百亿补贴 has price advantage in most categories, losing to Taobao only in rare limited-time coupon deals

verification.verifier_notes: Zhihu user comparison post with screenshots. Cross-referenced with 36kr and woshipm.com analyses. iPhone 16 Pro with 国补 stacking confirmed by multiple sources.

extractions.claim: PDD's pricing algorithm systematically matches or undercuts competitors by minimal margins, creating perception of always-lowest-price
extractions.evidence: Pinduoduo showed more targeted pricing, often beating JD by as little as 1 yuan, 0.1 yuan, or even 0.01 yuan on identical products. The practice of algorithmically matching and marginally undercutting is exactly what the April 2026 SAMR regulation targets. PDD's commission rate is also lowest: 0.6% on main site, 1-3% for 百亿补贴 items, vs higher rates at JD and Taobao — enabling thinner margins.

verification.verifier_notes: Multiple Chinese consumer comparison posts document the systematic ¥0.01 undercutting pattern. Commission rates from platform merchant documentation.

extractions.claim: Platform differentiation beyond price: JD wins on speed (next-day delivery) and authenticity (self-operated), PDD wins on price, Taobao in between
extractions.evidence:
Platform comparison summary:
- PDD: Usually lowest price, 3-7 day shipping, verified genuine (百亿补贴), 0.6% commission, improving after-sales
- JD: Competitive on Apple/3C, next-day delivery (self-operated via JD Express), self-operated = guaranteed authentic, highest commission (8-10% take rate), best after-sales
- Taobao: Middle ground on price, ~3 day shipping, varies by store on authenticity, 3-5% take rate, average after-sales

For identical branded products across 百亿补贴 programs, price differences have narrowed to single-digit yuan. PDD maintains slight edge on most non-Apple categories.

verification.verifier_notes: Composite from multiple Chinese e-commerce analysis sources. Shipping speeds and commission rates verified against platform merchant documentation.
